data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the fill-rate based pricing model, which specifies pricing adjustments based on the occupancy level (20% full = $20, 80% full = $30). However, the evidence provided only includes fixed pricing scenarios without any indication of dynamic pricing adjustments based on fill rates. This lack of evidence leads to the conclusion that there is a gap in requirement satisfaction for this specific pricing model.
gaps: Fill-rate based pricing (20% full = $20, 80% full = $30) is not evidenced in the current implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
